message: Fixed submissions showing 0 results. Migrated data had form:null and date stored as strings instead of BSON Date — Prisma strict typing rejected all reads silently. Backfilled 7 null form fields to 'contact', converted 7 string dates to proper BSON Date via $dateFromString. Made form field optional in Prisma schema to prevent future breakage. All 9 submissions and 13 error logs now load correctly.

Fixed build error: Module not found 'apexcharts'. Installed missing apexcharts peer dependency required by react-apexcharts. Build was failing entirely, preventing all dashboard changes from deploying.

Fixed 404 errors and submissions not refreshing from DB. Added export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic' to all data API routes (/api/admin/errors, /api/submissions, /api/redirects, /api/404-log, /api/changelog) to prevent Next.js static caching. Added cache:'no-store' to client-side fetch calls in TabRedirects and Submissions page. Data now always comes fresh from MongoDB on every page load.

Added Submissions dashboard page at /dashboards/submissions with summary cards (total/unread/read), searchable table with form type badges, read/unread Segment filter, pagination, and detail dialog. Nav entry added under Dashboard menu (admin-only) with translations in all 4 locales. Fixed changelog ordering — now sorts by date desc then id desc so entries on the same day appear in correct creation order.

Submissions now send SMTP email notification to team on POST (fire-and-forget via nodemailer). Admin users get in-app notification for each new submission. Added noStore() to GET /api/admin/errors, GET /api/submissions, and GET /api/redirects so 404 errors, submissions, and redirects always fetch fresh from DB on page refresh. POST /api/submissions now returns 201 and explicitly sets read:false. Created reusable src/lib/mailer.js with styled HTML email builder. Installed nodemailer@7.

Fixed API routes being blocked by middleware auth redirect. Middleware now skips all /api/* routes — each API route handles its own auth internally. Fixed Redirects dashboard showing 0 errors. Added nav.dashboard.redirects translation key to all 4 locales (en/ar/es/zh). Fixed error_logs data migration (string dates, missing fields, deduplication).

Auto-redirect on 404 pages. Added GET /api/redirects/check?path= endpoint (public, CORS) that looks up active redirects and increments hit counter. Updated not-found.jsx to check for redirects on load and auto-redirect before showing the 404 page. Frontend can use the same endpoint.

Redirects & 404 management system. Added Redirect Prisma model and updated ErrorLog to aggregate by path with hitCount. CRUD API at /api/redirects with CORS. POST /api/404-log now upserts by path. Standalone page at /dashboards/redirects under Dashboard menu with summary cards, search, 404 errors table (sorted by hits, Fix button), redirects table (edit/toggle/delete), and create/edit dialog with 301/302 type selection.

Fixed access-denied redirect after deploy — added /access-denied to publicRoutes, removed duplicate public-pages page. Fixed AUTH_SECRET (was placeholder) and added AUTH_TRUST_HOST=true for production proxy support. Suppressed Node.js DEP0108 deprecation warning. Fixed PageStats AI column to sum aiClicks embedded object — added aiClicks Json field to PageStat Prisma model. Fixed changelog tab switching — Segment onChange returns string not array.

Fixed Page Stats AI column — added aiClicks Json field to PageStat Prisma model (was present in MongoDB but missing from schema). AI count now correctly sums per-engine clicks (chatgpt, gemini, claude, perplexity, grok) from the embedded aiClicks object. Fixed changelog tab switching bug — Segment onChange returns string not array. Hardened changelog API for empty project param.

Added Page Stats section to Analytics tab with server-side pagination, sortable columns (views/likes/shares), and search. Removed incorrect AI column (no backing data). Fixed changelog tab switching bug — Segment onChange returns string not array, causing project filter to break when switching back to backend. Indexing tab now paginated (15/page). Changelog API supports pagination (?page&limit), frontend uses Pagination component. Created Submissions & 404 Logs API: POST/GET /api/submissions, PATCH /api/submissions/:id, POST /api/404-log (with CORS, rate limiting, dedup), GET /api/admin/errors.

GA4 chart now pads missing days with zeros so the full month/week is shown (e.g. March 1–24 instead of only 14 data points starting from March 11). Forced full .next rebuild to clear stale Turbopack cache.

Hour labels on Day filter changed to plain 24h numbers (0–23) across Analytics and Google tabs. GA4 chart x-axis labels always visible so actual data dates are clear. GA4 data starts from March 11 (service account grant date) with ~24h processing delay — not a bug.

Filter choices now persist across page refresh via localStorage (analytics period, Google period, active tab). Fixed GA4 chart date filtering cutting off mid-month. Time format changed to 24h (00:00–23:00) across all dashboard charts.

Period filter defaults to Day on both Analytics and Google tabs. Filter order: Day/Week/Month/Year. Compact chart labels: 0H–23H (day), Mo/Tu/We (week), 1–31 (month), Jan–Dec (year). Google tab GA4 chart filters by period with compact x-axis labels. Added GA4 summary cards (Pageviews/Sessions/Users) that update with period. All graphs and metric cards respond to filter changes.

Added Daily period filter to Analytics tab with hourly buckets (00:00–23:00). Google tab now has matching 'Show by' dropdown (Daily/Weekly/Monthly/Last 90 Days) filtering GA4 chart client-side. Removed debug console.logs from getGoogleAnalytics.

Fixed Google APIs returning null — JWT auth constructor changed from positional args to options object form. GA4, Search Console, and URL Inspection API all working now. Fixed indexed status: uses URL Inspection API for real index verdict (PASS/FAIL) instead of SC impressions-only heuristic, with inspect results cached in IndexingLog. Indexing tab: 2-hour cooldown after index request (button disabled), compact relative time in Last Push column (1m/2h/3d — no wrapping), bulk index survives tab switch via useRef with cancel button and progress counter, inspect button per page to check real Google index status on demand.

Improved Google and Indexing tabs. Google tab: proper 'Not Configured' state showing env var names, 'No Data' fallback, null/empty guards, icon summary cards, device progress bars, country flags. Indexing tab: compact icon-only design — type (TbFileText/TbArticle/TbBriefcase) and status (TbCircleCheck/TbCircleX) as tooltip icons with no text, tighter table layout, bulk index with checkbox selection, dynamic Select to fix hydration.

Indexing tab rebuilt with full page list from PageStat (72 pages). Shows name, path, type badge (Page/Blog/Portfolio), views, indexed status from Search Console, last push time (relative), and smart actions: disabled push for indexed pages, green push for not-indexed, recheck and remove buttons. Added IndexingLog Prisma model to track all push requests with timestamp/status/method. Filters for search, type, and status. Custom URL indexing input. API route logs every push to DB.

Google Analytics & Search Console integration. Added google-apis.js utility with GA4 visitors, SC keywords, search traffic, top pages, device/country breakdown, and indexing API functions. Analytics dashboard now has 3 tabs: Analytics, Google, Indexing. Fixed hydration mismatch from react-select by dynamically importing AnalyticHeader with ssr:false. Requires GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_EMAIL, GOOGLE_PRIVATE_KEY, GA4_PROPERTY_ID, SEARCH_CONSOLE_SITE_URL env vars.

Fixed analytics dashboard showing all zeros. Backfilled null date fields on 8,750 PageEvent records. Rewrote getAnalyticDashboard to use raw MongoDB aggregate with $ifNull to coalesce date/createdAt fields, so it works regardless of which field the frontend sets. Added noStore() to prevent Next.js caching stale data. Dashboard now shows real stats: 2,863 events this month, 8,261 this year.

Changelog moved to MongoDB. Added project and files fields to Changelog Prisma model to support backend/frontend separation. New API at GET/POST /api/changelog with project filter. Changelog page rewritten as client component with Backend/Frontend toggle tabs, type badges, and file list display. Seed script imports all 66 existing JSON entries as backend project. Frontend dev can POST entries with project:'frontend'.

Analytics dashboard wired to MongoDB via Prisma. getAnalyticDashboard now queries PageEvent collection for real views, likes, and shares data with weekly/monthly/yearly period filtering and previous-period growth comparison. Chart legend updated to Views/Likes/Shares. Metric cards renamed to Page Views, Engagement rate, Interactions. Top pages derived from actual slug view counts. Graceful fallback on error.

Improved mail attachment experience in detail view. Image attachments now show inline thumbnail previews with hover overlay for open/download. Download button uses fetch+blob to force actual file download on cross-origin CDN URLs. Non-image files retain file icon card with open and download buttons.

Mail listing now shows a paperclip icon next to the subject (desktop) and sender name (mobile) when any message in the thread has attachments. Attachment viewing and downloading was already supported in the detail view.

Chat and mail delete actions now respect RBAC permissions. Delete buttons only render when user role has chat.delete or mail.delete enabled. Applied to ChatAction dropdown, MailBodyTop bulk delete, and MailList per-row delete (desktop + mobile). Uses useCurrentSession + useAuthority hooks consistent with existing nav permission pattern.

Chat and group conversations now permanently delete from DB. Added DELETE /api/chat/[id] endpoint that removes all messages then the conversation. ChatAction delete button calls the API instead of only clearing local state.

Fixed mail not permanently deleting from Deleted folder. Deleting mail already in Deleted now hard-deletes from DB via DELETE /api/mail/[id]. Deleting from other folders still soft-deletes (moves to Deleted).

Added delete permission for Chat and Mail roles. New CHAT_DELETE and MAIL_DELETE constants. Chat and Mail modules in Roles & Permissions dialog now show Read/Write/Delete toggles (was Read/Write only). Admin, Supervisor, and Support default roles updated with delete access. Cleared old roles from DB to re-seed.

Fixed build error 'Cannot assign to this' in invoice dashboard. The StatisticCard component declaration was missing its const variable name (line 89 had ' = ({...' instead of 'const StatisticCard = ({...'). Restored the missing prefix to fix Turbopack parse failure.

Fixed invoice dashboard chart showing absurdly long Y-axis numbers (200000.00000000000). Y-axis and tooltips now use K/M abbreviation (e.g. 165.2K MAD). Top Countries section now shows full country names (Morocco, United States) instead of ISO codes (MA, US) with correct flag images and map tooltip support. Added codeToCountry reverse lookup map.

Invoice dashboard redesigned to match ecommerce dashboard pattern. Overview and Payment Target now default to Monthly filter (was All Time). Numbers use K/M abbreviation via AbbreviateNumber component (e.g. 82.4K, 1.3M). Percentage changes use GrowShrinkValue with colored +/- indicators. Payment Target has its own period dropdown (Monthly/Weekly/Annualy) matching Sales Target design. Summary and Amounts sections also use abbreviated numbers. Added granular RBAC permissions for chat, mail, customers with icons in Roles dialog. Fixed notification 404 links.

Added granular RBAC permissions for all new features: chat (read/write), mail (read/write), customers (read/write/delete). Invoices permissions already existed. Updated all 6 default roles with appropriate access levels. Navigation and route configs now use dedicated permission constants (CUSTOMERS_READ, CHAT_READ, MAIL_READ) instead of overloading USERS_READ. Roles & Permissions dialog shows new modules with icons (TbMessageCircle, TbMail, TbFileInvoice, TbUsers). Fixed notification links causing 404 — chat link changed from /concepts/chat/:id to /concepts/chat since chat uses state-based routing. Cleared old roles from DB to re-seed with new permissions.

Notifications now link to their source page — clicking a chat notification navigates to the conversation, mail notification goes to inbox, invoice notification opens the invoice detail. Added Apple-style tri-tone notification sound (Web Audio API, no external files) that plays when new notifications arrive. Polling every 15 seconds for real-time awareness. Bell icon now shows numeric unread count badge (red circle) instead of just a dot. Added link field to Notification Prisma model.

Notification system fully wired to Prisma. Notifications created automatically for: chat messages (all other participants notified), new mail (recipient notified), invoice status changes to sent/paid (admin users notified). Mark as read and mark all as read now persist to DB via PUT /api/notifications. NotificationAvatar displays contextual icons — person avatar for chat, calendar icon for mail, clipboard icon for invoices. Fixed 500 error on /api/notifications and /api/notifications/count (were importing from mock data, now use Prisma).

Three chat UX improvements: (1) Unread badge now shows the actual count number instead of just a dot in the conversation list. (2) Chat scrolls to bottom when opening a conversation and after sending a message (100ms delay for DOM render). (3) URLs in chat messages are now clickable links — linkifyContent detects https/http URLs and renders them as anchor tags with target=_blank.

Fixed 4 issues: (1) Mail delete now moves to Deleted folder instead of hard-deleting from DB. (2) Fixed uncontrolled-to-controlled Checkbox error in MailList — mail.checked was undefined from DB, now coerced with !!. (3) Chat group member management — added Add/Remove member buttons in ContactInfoDrawer with contact picker dialog, backed by new PUT /api/chat/[id] endpoint. (4) Media/Files/Links tabs in contact drawer now show real data extracted from conversation message attachments and content URLs instead of empty arrays.

Chat and mail now support all non-dangerous file types (PDF, DOC, XLS, ZIP, images, video, audio, etc.). Upload route blocks dangerous extensions (exe, bat, sh, dll, etc.). Chat: attachment icon changed from photo-only to paperclip, accepts any safe file, sends file name/size metadata. Chat Attachment component redesigned with file-type icons, hover download/open buttons on images/videos, inline open+download for documents. Mail: MailDetailContent now shows download and open icons on each attachment, plus a per-message reply button. ChatInput allows sending attachments without text.

Fixed 3 remaining mail/chat issues: (1) Moving mail to a label (Work/Private/Important) no longer makes it disappear — onMoveMailClick and onBatchMoveMailClick now update the label field instead of group. (2) Added file attachment support to mail compose — upload files to DO Spaces via /api/upload, display as removable chips, save attachment metadata to MailThreadMessage.attachments. (3) Group chat invite already working from previous fix (switches to groups tab after creation).

Fixed 3 chat/mail issues: (1) Double messages — handlePushMessage was pushing to both zustand record and local state sharing the same array reference; now only updates local state and always fetches fresh from DB on conversation switch. (2) Chat images not sending — attachments were discarded (sent as empty array); now uploads to DO Spaces via /api/upload first, then sends CDN URLs in message payload. (3) Mail not received by recipient — POST only created sentItem for sender; now also creates inbox thread for recipient by looking up their userId via email.

Fixed duplicate chat messages and React key collision error. Replaced lodash uniqueId (which resets on page load, generating colliding keys like chat-conversation-1) with timestamp+random IDs. Fixed messageList memo mutating items in place — now returns new objects via spread and handles both unix-number and Date timestamps safely.

Chat and Mail fully wired to Prisma/MongoDB. Replaced all mock data with real DB queries. Chat: personal + group conversations with Users and Customers as contacts, message persistence, new conversation creation, contact details drawer with group member support. Mail: threaded mail with nested messages, category/label filtering (inbox/sent/draft/starred/deleted), star/flag/move/delete actions persisted to DB, compose and send mail via API. Updated Prisma schema: replaced flat MailMessage with MailThread + MailThreadMessage models, enhanced ChatConversation with chatType/avatar, enhanced ChatMessage with senderName/senderAvatar/attachments. Seed script for 6 conversations and 9 mail threads.

Seeded 10 test customers and 20 invoices (spread across 6 months, mixed statuses/countries) for dashboard testing. Added Edit User dialog to Roles & Permissions — click pencil icon to edit name, email, password, phone, title, role, and status. New editUser API action on /api/roles/users.

Customer form fixes: image upload now goes to DO Spaces (not blob URL), phone number + dial code saved to DB, password field added, location field removed (redundant with address), delivery address section added with separate fields. Customer detail billing tab: addresses now editable inline with save to API. Invoice dashboard: period filter now changes all stat cards + summary + recent invoices (not just chart). Added previous-period comparison with +/- % badges (green/red/orange) on all stat cards, summary rows, and amounts section. Prisma schema updated with dialCode, password, delivery address fields on Customer.

Customer detail page: added Invoices tab (default) showing all invoices for the customer with summary cards (total/paid/unpaid/amount), status badges, payment method, and view button. Fixed delete handler in ProfileSection to actually call DELETE API instead of just navigating away. Invoices API now supports customerId query param for filtering.

Moved all logo and favicon URLs to env vars (NEXT_PUBLIC_LOGO_LIGHT, NEXT_PUBLIC_LOGO_DARK, NEXT_PUBLIC_FAVICON). Logo component, NavigationBar, LandingFooter, invoice detail PDF, and page-meta favicon all read from .env. No more hardcoded CDN URLs in source — swap branding by editing .env only.

Invoice dashboard: added period filter (Today/Week/Month/Quarter/Year) and Top Countries section with world map, country flags, and progress bars. Customer list table now shows Invoices Paid and Invoices Unpaid columns with counts and totals. Invoice PDF: fixed broken logo by converting SVG to base64 data URI, improved layout with status badge, alternating row colors, dark TTC bar, structured Bill To/From sections, and clean legal footer. Invoice form: drag-to-reorder items via @hello-pangea/dnd with grip handles. All invoice labels switched to English.

Completed invoice dashboard page matching ecommerce dashboard design. Overview card with 3 clickable stat cards (Outstanding/Overdue/Paid) that switch the line chart series. Right sidebar: Payment Target with circular progress, Summary with icon list and counts, Amounts breakdown with percentage bars and icon grid. Bottom: Recent Invoices table with status badges, client names, and amounts via @tanstack/react-table. Fixed API param mismatch (sortKey/order) and customer name resolution in table.

Redesigned invoice dashboard to match ecommerce dashboard layout exactly. Uses same Card, StatisticCard, Progress, Badge, NumericFormat, @tanstack/react-table components. Left column: overview stat cards + status breakdown with progress bars. Right sidebar: payment target with circular progress, summary counts list, amount breakdown with percentage bars and icon grid. Bottom: recent invoices table.

Invoice module enhancements: payment tracking (method, amount, date) on form and detail view. List table with sortable columns, checkbox selection, bulk delete/open. Recurring invoices auto-create next draft when marked paid. Invoice dashboard page with stat cards (outstanding, overdue, paid), status overview with progress bars for factures and devis. New API endpoints: /api/invoices/stats, /api/invoices/bulk. Prisma schema updated with paymentMethod, paymentAmount, paymentDate fields.
Fixed invoice detail page parse error (truncated file at line 45). Rewrote complete file and cleared stale Turbopack cache.

Invoice & Devis module redesigned with professional TRT Digital branded template. Auto-numbering FA-NNN/MM/YYYY with number decrement on delete. Recurring invoice toggle (monthly/yearly, 1-12 cycles or infinite). Professional detail page with company info (RC/IF/CNSS/ICE/TP), styled items table with dark header, Total HT/TVA/Total TTC, total in French words (numberToFrenchWords utility). PDF download via html2pdf.js. French labels throughout. InvoiceForm with recurring options, unit field per item. InvoiceList with type/status filters, recurring badge.
Added missing i18n translation keys for Invoice nav items (conceptsInvoices) across all 4 locale files (en, ar, es, zh). Fixes MISSING_MESSAGE console errors for nav.conceptsInvoices.*.

Invoice & Devis module fully wired to Prisma/MongoDB. Full CRUD: list with filtering by status/type, create with auto-numbering (TRT-YYYY-NNN), edit, detail view with print support. Line items with quantity/unit price, auto-calculated subtotal/tax/total. Customer selector from DB. Currency support (MAD/EUR/USD). Tax rate configurable per invoice. Navigation and route config with RBAC (invoices.read/write permissions). Default roles updated with invoices access. ProductService CRUD functions added. ProductEdit field mapping fixed (sku→productCode, images→imgList). ProductForm validation relaxed for optional fields.
Folders now display total size of their contents. Size is calculated server-side by summing all child file sizes in the GET /api/files handler.

File manager UX: clicking a folder card/row now navigates into it directly instead of opening the details drawer. Image files (jpg, jpeg, png, webp, gif, svg, bmp) show thumbnail previews in both grid and list views. Details drawer image detection expanded to all image types.

Fixed Access Denied for admin role. Admin now treated as superuser in middleware (bypasses granular permission checks) and useAuthority hook (all nav items visible). JWT update trigger now rebuilds full authority array from role accessRight in DB, preventing stale permissions after session refresh.

Fixed profile PUT route missing User.name update. Now builds displayName from firstName+lastName and writes to name field, keeping session/JWT header in sync after profile save. Confirmed MongoDB Atlas cluster back online — all DB-dependent routes operational.
Added loading and error states to SettingsProfile. Form now shows feedback when DB is unreachable instead of blank fields. Added guard against resetting form with error response data.

Switched DO Spaces bucket from trtdigital-ma to trt-admin (CDN: trt-admin.ams3.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com). Fixed integration settings 500 error — replaced createMany with upsert to avoid unique constraint conflicts during default seed. Added file manager seed script (prisma/seed-files.cjs).

File Manager wired to DigitalOcean Spaces + Prisma. Upload files to DO Spaces with DB record, create folders, rename, delete (removes from S3 + DB), download via CDN URL. New Folder button added. Expanded upload route to support any file type (not just images) with saveToDb flag.
Replaced all logo images with trtdigital SVGs from DO Spaces CDN. Logo component, landing NavigationBar, and LandingFooter now use external SVG URLs with dark/light mode support.

Rebranded app from Ecme to trtdigital. Updated APP_NAME, page meta title, package.json name, copyright notices, landing page components, auth layout, all documentation pages, pricing FAQ email, and README.
Fixed profile PUT route not updating User.name field. Now builds displayName from firstName+lastName and writes to name, ensuring the session/JWT and header avatar stay in sync after profile save.

Role-based access control (RBAC) fully wired. Login now builds granular authority array from role accessRight (e.g. users.read, products.write). Navigation menu items and route configs use granular permissions to control visibility. Middleware RBAC enabled with dynamic route matching. Mapping: users→Customers, products→Products/Orders, configurations→AI/Roles, files→File Manager, reports→Dashboards/Help Center.

Fixed permission toggles not working when creating a new role. Segment value was reading from undefined (no selected role in create mode) and handleChange mutated state in place without triggering re-render. Now reads from local accessRight state for new roles and returns a new object reference on change.

Enhanced Roles & Permissions user management. Add User dialog now includes phone, title/position, role (dynamic from DB), and status fields. User table has per-row actions: status toggle (active/blocked) and individual delete with confirmation. Role cards have delete button (protected for admin role). Role edit dialog includes delete option in footer.

Roles & Permissions fully wired to MongoDB. Added Role Prisma model with auto-seed (6 default roles). Users table reads from DB with filtering, pagination, and sorting. Role assignment, user creation (with bcrypt), bulk deletion, and role CRUD all persist to DB. Add User dialog with name/email/password/role fields. getRolesPermissionsRoles and getRolesPermissionsUsers server actions now use Prisma.

Pricing plans editable from DB. Added PricingPlan Prisma model with auto-seed. Admin can edit plan name, description, and monthly/annual prices via inline dialog. Payment flow wired to DB: subscribing saves credit card, updates user plan, and creates transaction record. Billing settings reflects live subscription data. getPricingPlans server action now reads from Prisma instead of mock data.

Session review: marked TASK-010 (file upload integration) as done — avatar upload to DO Spaces with WebP conversion, sharp resizing, and CDN caching fully implemented. Updated task file paths to reflect actual route.

Replaced unreliable NextAuth updateSession() with zustand store for live header profile sync. SettingsProfile writes name/image/email to useProfileStore after save, UserProfileDropdown reads from store as override. Instant re-render, no session refresh dependency.

UserProfileDropdown now uses useSession() directly from next-auth instead of custom SessionContext, ensuring header avatar and name update live after profile save. Changelog page wired to read from src/data/changelog.json instead of hardcoded data.

Fixed header avatar/name not updating after profile save. Root cause: PUT /api/setting/profile was saving firstName/lastName but never updating the User.name field that the session reads. Now builds displayName from firstName+lastName and writes it to name. Cleared .next cache.

Live session sync for avatar and profile changes. After saving profile, the top-right header avatar and name update instantly via NextAuth session refresh. JWT callback re-fetches user data from DB on update trigger. AuthProvider now bridges NextAuth live session into custom SessionContext.

Image optimization pipeline: upload route now converts all images to WebP via sharp before uploading to DO Spaces. Auto-resizes per folder (avatars 256x256, products 800x800, default 1200x1200), configurable quality, immutable CDN caching. Returns compression stats.

Avatar upload to DigitalOcean Spaces. Profile image now uploads to S3-compatible CDN (trtdigital-ma/ams3) instead of using temporary blob URLs. Added upload API endpoint, S3 client lib, and wired profile component. Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF up to 5MB.
Cleared stale Turbopack cache (.next) that was serving the old profile route without PUT handler, causing persistent 405 errors despite correct file on disk. Requires dev server restart.

Added full settings reference doc (.kiro/steering/settings-reference.md) covering all 5 tabs, fields, DB mappings, API routes, response shapes, and known limitations. Fixed persistent profile route disk-sync issue via direct write.

Fixed settings page runtime errors: profile route was still serving old mock code (405 on PUT), Zod validation blocked submission for fresh users with empty fields (made all fields except email optional), integration update used invalid Prisma where clause (switched to updateMany), added toast feedback on profile save.

Fixed 405 Method Not Allowed on profile settings save. The profile API route file failed to write during initial deployment and was still serving the old mock-only GET handler. Rewrote with proper GET + PUT Prisma handlers.

Settings page fully wired to MongoDB via Prisma. All 5 tabs (profile, security, notification, billing, integration) now read from and save to the database. Replaced all mock data imports with Prisma queries. Added PUT endpoints for profile, notification, billing (plan + payment methods), integration toggles, and password change with bcrypt verification.

Session audit: reviewed settings page status. All 4 settings tabs (profile, notification, billing, integration) still use mock data from accountsData.js via API routes. No Prisma model for user settings exists yet. No database persistence for settings fields. Settings page work not started — needs Prisma model, API route rewrites, and form save handlers.

Removed hardcoded admin credentials. Seed script now reads ADMIN_NAME, ADMIN_EMAIL, ADMIN_PASSWORD from env vars. Cleared pre-filled demo creds from sign-in form and mock data. Updated docs and .env.example.
Downgraded Prisma from v7 to v6 (6.19.2) — Prisma 7 does not yet support MongoDB. Removed prisma.config.ts (v7-only). App now starts cleanly on dev server.

Project infrastructure & AI agent system: added architecture and coding standards steering docs, task tracker (12 tasks), 4 new agent hooks (env-check, task-tracker, mock-data-detector, api-route-validator), .env setup, and updated project roadmap.
Fixed Prisma edge runtime error in middleware by splitting auth config. Moved Credentials provider with Prisma dependency into server-side auth.js, keeping auth.config.js edge-compatible.
Resolved production start error due to missing .next build directory. No code changes; dependency lock updated.

Initial CRM setup: MongoDB backend with Prisma ORM, replaced mock data with real database queries for customers, products, orders, projects, and tasks. Added AI agent hooks for auto-changelog, DB validation, and schema consistency.
